# RFC Lite Template

```markdown
# RFC Lite: <decision title>

- Decision ID: <decision_id>
- Status: Draft / Proposed / Accepted / Rejected / Superseded
- Decision Needed By: <date or milestone>
- Owner: <person, team, or N/A>
- Scope: <project-config scope label>
- Related Request IDs: <request_id list or N/A>
- Blocks Ready Gate: Yes / No
- Ready Gate Impact: <what is blocked or N/A>

## Problem

<What decision is needed and why now?>

## Context

<Relevant background, constraints, and current behavior.>

## Options

| Option | Description | Benefits | Risks |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| A | <option> | <benefits> | <risks> |
| B | <option> | <benefits> | <risks> |

## Recommendation

<Recommended option and short rationale.>

## Consequences

- If accepted: <what changes>
- If rejected: <what remains true>
- Follow-up work: <requests, issues, docs, or N/A>

## Decision

<Accepted option, date, and decision-maker. Leave blank while draft.>

## Traceability

- Request Artifacts: <paths or N/A>
- Roadmap Entries: <paths/headings or N/A>
- Changelog Entries: <paths/headings or N/A>
```
